response.global_analysis: The audio contains initial English dialogue followed by Japanese dialogue and a musical performance of 'Remote Controller'. The song's audio phonetically matches the Japanese lyrics in the Reference JSON. Unused lyrics for the latter half of the song are discarded. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal activity, and English interjections in the song are included. Semantic continuity is maintained across dialogue pauses. On-screen mission text and character introductions are transcribed as per priorities.

subtitles.original: Yeah! How was that? That was the best performance ever, right?
subtitles.english: Yeah! How was that? That was the best performance ever, right?

subtitles.original: Hey! Over there! You liked it, right? Hey!
subtitles.english: Hey! Over there! You liked it, right? Hey!

subtitles.original: With this, I should be able to get back to my own world.
subtitles.english: With this, I should be able to get back to my own world.

subtitles.original: All right! Ready? Beam me up, Pebbles!
subtitles.english: All right! Ready? Beam me up, Pebbles!

subtitles.original: No!
subtitles.english: No!

subtitles.original: Pebbles! Where are you going?
subtitles.english: Pebbles! Where are you going?

subtitles.original: Dang it.
subtitles.english: Dang it.

subtitles.original: Well, according to video game logic, this must mean I must now go on an epic quest to find the coins or something.
subtitles.english: Well, according to video game logic, this must mean I must now go on an epic quest to find the coins or something.

subtitles.original: But I don't have time for that!
subtitles.english: But I don't have time for that!

subtitles.original: I need the coins back to get home! No!
subtitles.english: I need the coins back to get home! No!

subtitles.original: Huh?
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: Oh, what's this?
subtitles.english: Oh, what's this?

subtitles.original: I mean, I came out through there,
subtitles.english: I mean, I came out through there,

subtitles.original: so maybe this will take me, you know, on my next step of my quest?
subtitles.english: so maybe this will take me, you know, on my next step of my quest?

subtitles.original: Well, better than being stuck here.
subtitles.english: Well, better than being stuck here.

subtitles.original: So...
subtitles.english: So...

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!

subtitles.original: Ah!
subtitles.english: Ah!

subtitles.original: I'm not back in my world?
subtitles.english: I'm not back in my world?

subtitles.original: え？ ここどこ？
subtitles.english: Eh? Where is this?

subtitles.original: 待ってたよ、ビブー
subtitles.english: I've been waiting for you, Biboo.

subtitles.original: Robocosan Joins the Battle! Fighting Game Battle
subtitles.english: Robocosan Joins the Battle! Fighting Game Battle

subtitles.original: Eh? Eh?
subtitles.english: Eh? Eh?

subtitles.original: Roboco-senpai?
subtitles.english: Roboco-senpai?

subtitles.original: 探しているのは… これ？
subtitles.english: Is this... what you're looking for?

subtitles.original: Ah! Coin! The coin!
subtitles.english: Ah! Coin! The coin!

subtitles.original: MISSION: Reclaim the scattered coins from each stage's Game Master!
subtitles.english: MISSION: Reclaim the scattered coins from each stage's Game Master!

subtitles.original: これがないと元の世界に戻れないんでしょう。
subtitles.english: Without this, you won't be able to return to your world, right?

subtitles.original: でも、そうはさせない。
subtitles.english: But I won't let that happen.

subtitles.original: ゲームマスターである僕たちから 全て取り戻せるかな？
subtitles.english: Can you take everything back from us, the Game Masters?

subtitles.original: え？ 本当？
subtitles.english: Eh? Really?

subtitles.original: まあ、とにかくこのコインが欲しければ、
subtitles.english: Well, anyway, if you want this coin,

subtitles.original: 僕と勝負だ！
subtitles.english: you'll have to challenge me!

subtitles.original: Match?
subtitles.english: Match?

subtitles.original: そう、イエス！
subtitles.english: So, yes!

subtitles.original: 格闘ゲームで勝負だ！
subtitles.english: Challenge me in a fighting game!

subtitles.original: All right, I won't lose!
subtitles.english: All right, I won't lose!

subtitles.original: リモコン
subtitles.english: Remote Controller

subtitles.original: これが私をリモコン操作（かんたん）コントロールする機械です
subtitles.english: This is the machine that remote-controls me with ease.

subtitles.original: 少しイビツな形をしておりますが使えますか？
subtitles.english: It's a bit of an odd shape, but can you use it?

subtitles.original: もうちょっとで外に出られるのにな
subtitles.english: I was so close to getting outside.

subtitles.original: どうやってもうまく行かね
subtitles.english: No matter what I do, it doesn't go well.

subtitles.original: まだまだ、まだまだ足りない
subtitles.english: It's not enough, not enough yet.

subtitles.original: Sit down, please!
subtitles.english: Sit down, please!

subtitles.original: 回転（まわ）して、回転（まわ）して
subtitles.english: Turn it around, turn it around.

subtitles.original: Turn around!
subtitles.english: Turn around!

subtitles.original: どうやって踊りましょうか？
subtitles.english: How shall we dance?

subtitles.original: まだまだ、まだまだ踊り足りない
subtitles.english: Still, still not enough dancing.

subtitles.original: Dancing night!
subtitles.english: Dancing night!

subtitles.original: 踊って、踊って
subtitles.english: Dance, dance.

subtitles.original: Singing now!
subtitles.english: Singing now!

subtitles.original: あのコよりも上手く歌いたい
subtitles.english: I want to sing better than that girl.

subtitles.original: これが僕をリモコンで操縦できる機械です
subtitles.english: This is the machine that allows me to be controlled by remote.

subtitles.original: 説明書は紛失しておりますが使えますか？
subtitles.english: The instruction manual is missing, but can you use it?
